title: Paper & Pen vs Wafeq
metaTitle: Paper & Pen vs Wafeq · Free Arabic Invoicing Alternative · Paper & Pen
metaDescription: Compare Paper & Pen and Wafeq on price, free plan, Arabic RTL, multi-currency and ERP modules. A free, Arabic-first alternative to Wafeq for the GCC and beyond.
keywords: paper and pen vs wafeq, wafeq alternative, free wafeq alternative, arabic accounting software, gcc invoicing software, free invoicing gcc
heroSubtitle: Wafeq is a strong, region-aware accounting product with solid Arabic support. Paper & Pen matches the Arabic depth, starts free, and extends into a full ERP. An honest, like-for-like comparison.
heroBullets: Grows into a full ERP, not just accounting

features.title: Free core
features.desc: Unlimited invoicing free forever, so you can start without committing to a paid plan.

features.title: Arabic and global
features.desc: Full Arabic RTL with five UI languages, billing in any currency for customers worldwide.

features.title: Full ERP path
features.desc: Add Inventory, HR, Manufacturing and Reports as you grow, beyond accounting and invoicing alone.

sections.title: Where Wafeq is strong
sections.body: Wafeq is a credible, region-aware accounting platform with genuine Arabic support and a clear focus on GCC compliance and e-invoicing. For a business that primarily wants clean cloud accounting with strong Arabic and regional tax handling, Wafeq is a sound, well-built choice.
items: Clear focus on GCC tax and e-invoicing

sections.title: Free start and full ERP reach
sections.body: Paper & Pen offers the same Arabic-first comfort, but starts genuinely free for unlimited invoicing and reaches beyond accounting into a complete ERP. Add Inventory, HR and Payroll, Manufacturing and Reports from the same workspace, bill in OMR, AED, SAR or any currency, take Paymob payments, and run a team across five languages, all from one free core.
items: One platform for the whole business, not just books

faqs.q: Is Paper & Pen a good Wafeq alternative?
faqs.a: Yes. It offers the same Arabic-first strength, but starts free and extends into a full ERP with inventory, HR and manufacturing, not accounting alone. Wafeq remains a strong choice for focused cloud accounting.

faqs.q: Does Paper & Pen have Arabic support as good as Wafeq?
faqs.a: Yes. Paper & Pen runs a full right-to-left Arabic interface and Arabic documents, and adds Hindi, Bengali and Urdu for mixed teams.
Sales and invoicing are free forever. You only pay for optional modules such as Inventory, HR, Accounting or Manufacturing.

faqs.q: Can Paper & Pen do more than accounting?
faqs.a: Yes. Beyond invoicing and books, you can run inventory, HR and payroll, manufacturing and reporting from the same workspace.

faqs.q: Is it ready for GCC VAT and e-invoicing needs?
faqs.a: Yes. The 5% GCC VAT rate is preset and tax is configurable for any country, with documents you can share by email or WhatsApp.

ctaSub: Create a free workspace, send invoices in Arabic or English, and grow into a full ERP when you are ready.
